title: Uncraftables Crafted!
description: This Mod Adds Many Crafting Recipes That You can not normally craft
body:
Uncraftables Crafted is A Mod That Adds Crafting Recipes That Should Be In The Game But Aren't
Here is A List:

Totem Of Undying
Saddle,
Name Tag, 
Iron Horse Armor,
Gold Horse Armor,
Diamond Horse Armor,
Bell,
Chainmail Helmet,
Chainmail Chestplate,
Chainmail Leggings, 
Chainmail Boots,
Trident,
Crying Obsidian,
Enchanted Golden Apple,
Gilded Blackstone,
Leather*,
Elytra,

That is all.

* One Saddle Anywhere On The Crafting Grid Will Give You 5 Leather

This mod will help if you are on a server where there are limited resources and you need to craft things.

Have A Nice Day Ya'll!
